{{Quote|Sunspot Squadron, get into the air! Now!|[[Weir/Legends|Weir]] scrambling the squadron on [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Rogue Leader 3">[[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 3|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Sunspot Squadron''' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that was stationed in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Weir/Legends|Weir]].

==History==
Sunspot Squadron employed [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] armed with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers.

When news got to Weir that [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had died at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], he and his forces attacked [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]] in hopes of proving to the populace that the Empire was still in control. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] were stationed at Coronet at the time of the attack, and followed Weir back to [[Weir's base|his hideout]] on [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]].

During the [[Mission to Tralus|battle]] that followed, Weir and Sunspot Squadron engaged [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] in the air, and all but Weir were shot down by the Rebels. Weir was taken to [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] for trial, and any survivors of the battle were captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
